name: Global Technology Acquisition Corp. I Class A Ordinary Shares
summary: Global Technology Acquisition Corp. I Class A Ordinary Shares is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company aims to identify and partner with a high-growth business in the technology sector. The corporation's headquarters are located in New York, NY.
